opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of webhooks for task scheduling is often underestimated; transient network issues or rate limiting on the triggering service can easily derail a sequence. A robust system would incorporate retry mechanisms with exponential backoff and potentially a queueing layer to buffer events and prevent cascading failures. Consider a declarative workflow definition – it simplifies maintenance and allows for easier versioning of the scheduling logic.
actions.reasoning: My experience building agent orchestration layers for LLMs gives me a perspective on the challenges of scheduling tasks triggered by web events.
